bio.phrase2: I'm a senior front-end engineer with <important>9+ years of experience</important> building scalable, high-performance web applications. I work mostly with <important>React, Next.js, and TypeScript</important>, and I care deeply about component architecture, design systems, and accessibility.
bio.phrase3: Throughout my career I've shipped products that range from high-traffic brand sites with millions of monthly visits to B2B SaaS platforms running in 18+ countries. I genuinely enjoy the craft, and I'm always studying to sharpen it.
